scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const f of ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock']){try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{}}const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||'';if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
